---
title: "Hakkımda"
image: profilim.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
---

# **Education**

-   B.S., Manufacturing Engineering, Atılım University, Turkey, 2016 - 2021.

-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.s

# **Employements**

1.  Innova Bilişim Çözümleri, Project Management Specialist, Jan 2024 - Current Status

2.  Novumek Technology, Project Engineer, October 2021- December 2023

# **Internships**

1.  Atılım University Metal Forming and Excellence Center, Intern, August 2020 - September 2020

2.  RMS Defense and Aviation, Intern, June 2019 - July 2019

# **Projects**

Information cannot be given due to confidentiality reasons; information about the project management procedures used will be provided upon request.

1.  September 2020 - June 2021\
    Atılım University, TURKEY\
    Single Stage Centrifugal Compressor Design and Optimization (TÜBİTAK–2209-A University Students Research Projects Support Program)

# **Publications**

1.  Seven, S., İbis, M. M., Coskuner, E., Baranoglu, B. (2022). Design of modular of modular planetary gearbox with two-stage planet gears for use in valve actuators. The 19th International Conference on Machine Design and Production (August 31- September 3 2022, Cappadocia, Turkey)

2.  Cavusoglu, H. S., Seven, S., Baranoglu, B. (2022). Surface roughness investigation with CBN inserts on the turning process of heat treated AISI 420 stainless steel. The 19th International Conference on Machine Design and Production (August 31-September 3 2022, Cappadocia, Turkey)

# **Competencies**

-   MS PROJECT

-   MS EXCEL

-   MS WORD PRIMAVERA

-   JIRA CONFLUENCE

# **Hobbies**

-   Theatre

-   Social Media

-   Culture & Art Events

-   Play Tennis
